title: Berry Harvester
body: Add compatibility between Create and Cobblemon so that Mechanical Harvesters automatically harvest Cobblemon berry bushes when they reach age 3, replant the bush without breaking it, and output 2–4 berries into the connected contraption’s inventory or belt system. The bush should remain at age 1 after harvesting, mimicking vanilla sweet berry behaviour but using Cobblemon’s growth stages. This ensures full automation without losing the plant or requiring manual replanting.
